x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Risk records provide the risk context Now Assist GRC uses for AI-driven risk scoring and mitigation recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate risk register for key business domains. Assign risk owners. Map risks to controls. Target: 20+ active risks.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ce9
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Risk records provide the risk context Now Assist GRC uses for AI-driven risk scoring and mitigation recommendations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Risk Register Population</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_risk_risk');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active risk records';

    if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active risks — Now Assist GRC has sufficient risk context for AI-driven scoring and mitigation recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active risks (target: 20+). Now Assist GRC risk recommendations will have limited coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active risks. Now Assist GRC requires a populated risk register for AI-driven risk scoring and mitigation recommendations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>GRC</module><number>CHK0000457</number><order>30</order><remediation_guidance>Populate risk register for key business domains. Assign risk owners. Map risks to controls. Target: 20+ active risks.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>8ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ce9</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Risk Register Population</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ce9</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
